function getTrendWeeks(limit = 12) {
  const weeks = Array.isArray(allWeeks) ? allWeeks : [];
  const selectedIdx = Math.min(Math.max(Number(currentIdx) || 0, 0), Math.max(weeks.length - 1, 0));
  const visibleHistory = weeks
    .slice(0, selectedIdx + 1)
    .filter(w => Array.isArray(w.projects) && w.projects.length);
  return visibleHistory.slice(Math.max(0, visibleHistory.length - limit));
}

function weekShortLabel(week) {
  return String(week?.weekLabel || week?.week || '').replace(/\s+20(\d{2})$/, " '$1") || '-';
}

function projectRiskEntryCount(project) {
  const structured = getRiskActionPairs(project).filter(item => item.risk).length;
  if (structured) return structured;
  return rawRiskItems(project).length;
}

function weeklyTrendPoints(weeks) {
  return weeks.map(week => {
    const projects = week.projects || [];
    const total = projects.length || 1;
    const riskPressure = projects.reduce((sum, p) => {
      const count = projectRiskEntryCount(p);
      const severity = p.status === 'red' ? 1.5 : 1;
      return sum + count * severity;
    }, 0);
    const avgProgress = Math.round(projects.reduce((sum, p) => sum + Number(p.progress || 0), 0) / total);
    const primaryRisks = projects.filter(p => getPrimaryRiskActionPair(p)?.risk).length;
    const updateLines = projects.reduce((sum, p) => sum + textLines(p.highlight).length + textLines(p.risk).length + textLines(p.next).length, 0);
    return { label: weekShortLabel(week), riskPressure: Math.round(riskPressure * 10) / 10, avgProgress, primaryRisks, updateLines };
  });
}

/* trend-axis:start */
function trendXCoordinates(count, width = 360, pad = 12) {
  if (count <= 0) return [];
  if (count === 1) return [width / 2];
  const step = (width - pad * 2) / (count - 1);
  return Array.from({ length: count }, (_, index) => pad + index * step);
}
/* trend-axis:end */

function renderTrendSvg(points, key, className = '') {
  const width = 720;
  const height = 132;
  const pad = 12;
  const plotBottom = 104;
  const values = points.map(p => Number(p[key] || 0));
  const max = Math.max(1, ...values);
  const min = Math.min(0, ...values);
  const span = Math.max(1, max - min);
  const xCoordinates = trendXCoordinates(points.length, width, pad);
  const coords = values.map((v, i) => {
    const x = xCoordinates[i];
    const y = plotBottom - ((v - min) / span) * (plotBottom - pad);
    return [x, y];
  });
  const d = coords.map(([x, y], i) => `${i ? 'L' : 'M'}${x.toFixed(1)},${y.toFixed(1)}`).join(' ');
  return `<svg class="weekly-trend-svg" viewBox="0 0 ${width} ${height}" role="img" aria-label="${escHtml(key)} trend">
    <line class="weekly-trend-axis" x1="${pad}" y1="${plotBottom}" x2="${width - pad}" y2="${plotBottom}"></line>
    <line class="weekly-trend-axis" x1="${pad}" y1="${pad}" x2="${pad}" y2="${plotBottom}"></line>
    <path class="weekly-trend-line ${className}" d="${d}"></path>
    ${coords.map(([x, y]) => `<circle class="weekly-trend-dot ${className}" cx="${x.toFixed(1)}" cy="${y.toFixed(1)}" r="3.6"></circle>`).join('')}
    ${points.map((point, index) => `<text class="weekly-trend-axis-label" x="${xCoordinates[index].toFixed(1)}" y="126">${escHtml(point.label)}</text>`).join('')}
  </svg>`;
}

function renderWeeklyTrendPanel() {
  const weeks = getTrendWeeks();
  const points = weeklyTrendPoints(weeks);
  if (points.length < 2) return '';
  const latest = points[points.length - 1];
  const previous = points[points.length - 2];
  const riskDelta = latest.riskPressure - previous.riskPressure;
  const progressDelta = latest.avgProgress - previous.avgProgress;
  return `<div class="exec-decision-panel weekly-trend-panel">
    <div class="exec-decision-head">
      <div>
        <div class="exec-eyebrow">Weekly Portfolio Trend</div>
        <div class="exec-decision-title">Trend signals from accumulated weekly updates</div>
      </div>
      <div class="exec-panel-note">Last ${points.length} weeks</div>
    </div>
    <div class="weekly-trend-grid">
      <section class="weekly-trend-card">
        <div class="weekly-trend-head">
          <div><div class="weekly-trend-title">Risk pressure</div><div class="weekly-trend-sub">Total risk entries across projects; Critical risk entries count 1.5x</div></div>
          <div class="weekly-trend-value">${latest.riskPressure}<span class="exec-panel-note"> ${riskDelta >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${riskDelta}</span></div>
        </div>
        ${renderTrendSvg(points, 'riskPressure', 'risk')}
      </section>
      <section class="weekly-trend-card">
        <div class="weekly-trend-head">
          <div><div class="weekly-trend-title">Average progress</div><div class="weekly-trend-sub">Portfolio delivery progress across active projects</div></div>
          <div class="weekly-trend-value">${latest.avgProgress}%<span class="exec-panel-note"> ${progressDelta >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${progressDelta}%</span></div>
        </div>
        ${renderTrendSvg(points, 'avgProgress')}
      </section>
    </div>
  </div>`;
}

function rawRiskItems(p) {
  return textLines(p.risk).filter(l => l && !/^no risk\b/i.test(l));
}

function getRiskActionPairs(p) {
  const saved = Array.isArray(p?.riskActions) ? p.riskActions : [];
  const structured = saved.map((item, index) => ({
    risk: String(item?.risk || '').trim(),
    action: String(item?.action || '').trim(),
    primary: item?.primary === true || item?.isPrimary === true || index === 0 && saved.every(x => !x?.primary && !x?.isPrimary)
  })).filter(item => item.risk || item.action);
  if (structured.length) {
    if (!structured.some(item => item.primary)) structured[0].primary = true;
    return structured.sort((a, b) => Number(b.primary) - Number(a.primary));
  }
  const risks = rawRiskItems(p);
  const actions = textLines(p?.next);
  const max = Math.max(risks.length, actions.length);
  return Array.from({ length: max }, (_, index) => ({
    risk: risks[index] || '',
    action: actions[index] || '',
    primary: index === 0
  })).filter(item => item.risk || item.action);
}

function getPrimaryRiskActionPair(p) {
  const pairs = getRiskActionPairs(p);
  return pairs.find(item => item.primary) || pairs[0] || null;
}

function riskItems(p) {
  return getRiskActionPairs(p).map(item => item.risk).filter(Boolean);
}

function hasRiskMilestone(p) {
  return (p.milestones || []).some(m => m.status === 'at-risk' || m.status === 'risk');
}

function shouldIncludeRisk(p) {
  const attention = getProjectAttention(p);
  if (p.riskList !== undefined) return p.riskList === true;
  return p.status !== 'green' || attention === 'action' || attention === 'monitor' || riskItems(p).length > 0 || hasRiskMilestone(p);
}

function riskReasons(p) {
  const reasons = [];
  const attention = getProjectAttention(p);
  if (p.status === 'red') reasons.push('Critical status');
  else if (p.status === 'yellow') reasons.push('Schedule / delivery risk');
  if (attention === 'action') reasons.push('Needs executive action');
  else if (attention === 'monitor') reasons.push('Needs close monitoring');
  if (riskItems(p).length > 0) reasons.push('Blocker reported');
  if (hasRiskMilestone(p)) reasons.push('Milestone at risk');
  return reasons.length ? reasons : ['No escalation reason'];
}

function stripMarkdown(v) {
  return String(v || '')
    .replace(/<br\s*\/?>/gi, '\n')
    .replace(/<\/p>\s*<p>/gi, '\n')
    .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '')
    .replace(/\*\*\*([^*]+)\*\*\*/g, '$1')
    .replace(/\*\*([^*]+)\*\*/g, '$1')
    .replace(/___([^_]+)___/g, '$1')
    .replace(/__([^_]+)__/g, '$1')
    .replace(/\*([^*]+)\*/g, '$1')
    .replace(/_([^_]+)_/g, '$1')
    .replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, '$1')
    .replace(/\*+/g, '');
}

function normalizeSummaryHeading(line) {
  const cleaned = stripMarkdown(line)
    .replace(/^>\s*/, '')
    .replace(/^#{1,6}\s*/, '')
    .replace(/^\d+[.)]\s+/, '')
    .replace(/[:：]\s*$/, '')
    .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
    .trim();
  const known = /^(weekly movement|weekly progress|portfolio movement|project movement|executive summary|key updates|management ask|management asks|management request|decision needed|executive ask|support needed)$/i;
  if (known.test(cleaned)) return cleaned;
  if (cleaned.length <= 48 && /^[A-Z][A-Za-z0-9&/() -]+$/.test(cleaned)) return cleaned;
  if (cleaned.length <= 32 && /[\u4e00-\u9fff]/.test(cleaned) && !/[.!?。！？]$/.test(cleaned)) return cleaned;
  return '';
}

function splitInlineSummaryHeading(line) {
  const clean = stripMarkdown(line).replace(/^[-*+]\s+/, '').replace(/^\d+[.)]\s+/, '').trim();
  const known = clean.match(/^(Weekly Movement|Weekly Progress|Portfolio Movement|Project Movement|Executive Summary|Key Updates|Management Ask|Management Asks|Management Request|Decision Needed|Executive Ask|Support Needed)[:：]\s*(.+)$/i);
  if (known) return { heading: known[1], body: known[2] };
  const cjk = clean.match(/^([\u4e00-\u9fffA-Za-z0-9&/() -]{2,24})[:：]\s*(.+)$/);
  if (cjk && /[\u4e00-\u9fff]/.test(cjk[1])) return { heading: cjk[1], body: cjk[2] };
  return null;
}

function isLikelySummaryHeading(line) {
  const raw = String(line || '').trim();
  if (!raw) return false;
  if (/^#{1,6}\s+/.test(raw)) return true;
  if (/^\d+[.)]\s+/.test(raw) && normalizeSummaryHeading(raw)) return true;
  if (/^(\*\*|__)[^*_]+(\*\*|__)\s*[:：]?$/.test(raw)) return true;
  return /[:：]\s*$/.test(raw) && normalizeSummaryHeading(raw);
}

function normalizeSummaryBullet(line) {
  return String(line || '')
    .replace(/^[•‣▪▫◦]\s*/, '- ')
    .replace(/^[–—]\s+/, '- ')
    .replace(/^\d+[.)]\s+/, '- ')
    .replace(/^[-*+]\s+/, '- ');
}

function sanitizeSummaryInput(text) {
  const out = [];
  String(text || '').replace(/\r\n?/g, '\n').split('\n').forEach(raw => {
    let line = raw.trim();
    if (!line || /^```/.test(line) || /^[-*_]{3,}$/.test(line)) return;
    if (/^\|?\s*:?-{3,}:?\s*(\|\s*:?-{3,}:?\s*)+\|?$/.test(line)) return;
    if (line.includes('|') && line.split('|').filter(Boolean).length >= 2) {
      const cells = line.split('|').map(c => stripMarkdown(c.trim())).filter(Boolean);
      if (cells.length) out.push(`- ${cells.join(': ')}`);
      return;
    }
    const inlineHeading = splitInlineSummaryHeading(line);
    if (inlineHeading) {
      out.push(`## ${inlineHeading.heading}`);
      out.push(inlineHeading.body);
      return;
    }
    if (isLikelySummaryHeading(line)) {
      out.push(`## ${normalizeSummaryHeading(line)}`);
      return;
    }
    line = normalizeSummaryBullet(line).replace(/^>\s*/, '');
    line = stripMarkdown(line).replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
    if (line) out.push(line);
  });
  return out.join('\n');
}

function renderSummaryContent(summary, projects = []) {
  const text = sanitizeSummaryInput(summary || '').trim();
  if (!text) return '<div class="exec-empty-summary">No weekly summary has been saved yet. Use Week Management to copy the AI prompt, paste the generated output, and save it.</div>';
  const lines = textLines(text);
  const isBullet = line => /^[-*]\s+/.test(line) || /^\d+[.)]\s+/.test(line);
  const projectKeys = (projects || []).flatMap(p => [p.name, p.code].filter(Boolean).map(v => String(v).trim())).sort((a, b) => b.length - a.length);
  const parseProjectLine = line => {
    const clean = line.replace(/^[-*]\s+/, '').replace(/^\d+[.)]\s+/, '').trim();
    const lower = clean.toLowerCase();
    for (const key of projectKeys) {
      const keyLower = key.toLowerCase();
      if (lower.startsWith(`${keyLower}:`)) {
        return { name: key, body: clean.slice(key.length + 1).trim() };
      }
      if (lower.startsWith(`${keyLower} `)) {
        const remainder = clean.slice(key.length).trim();
        if (/^[^:]{1,48}:\s*\S/.test(remainder)) {
          return { name: key, body: remainder };
        }
      }
    }
    return null;
  };
  const renderProjectItem = item => `
    <div class="exec-summary-project-item">
      <strong class="exec-summary-project-name">${escHtml(item.name)}</strong>
      <span class="exec-summary-project-body">${escHtml(item.body)}</span>
    </div>`;
  const isHeading = (line, idx) => {
    if (/^#{1,3}\s+/.test(line)) return true;
    const clean = line.replace(/:$/, '').trim();
    if (!clean || isBullet(line) || clean.length > 72 || /[.!?]$/.test(clean)) return false;
    if (/^(weekly movement|management ask|executive summary|key updates|portfolio movement|decision needed|management request)$/i.test(clean)) return true;
    return idx < lines.length - 1 && isBullet(lines[idx + 1]);
  };
  let html = '';
  let inSection = false;
  let inList = false;
  let portfolioLeadRendered = false;
  const openSection = title => {
    let section = '';
    if (inList) { section += '</ul>'; inList = false; }
    if (inSection) section += '</section>';
    inSection = true;
    return `${section}<section class="exec-summary-section"><h4>${escHtml(title.replace(/^#{1,3}\s+/, '').replace(/:$/, ''))}</h4>`;
  };
  lines.forEach((line, idx) => {
    if (isHeading(line, idx)) {
      html += openSection(line);
    } else if (isBullet(line)) {
      const projectItem = parseProjectLine(line);
      if (!inSection) {
        html += '<section class="exec-summary-section">';
        inSection = true;
      }
      if (projectItem) {
        if (inList) { html += '</ul>'; inList = false; }
        html += renderProjectItem(projectItem);
        return;
      }
      if (!inList) { html += '<ul>'; inList = true; }
      html += `<li>${escHtml(line.replace(/^[-*]\s+/, '').replace(/^\d+[.)]\s+/, ''))}</li>`;
    } else {
      const projectItem = parseProjectLine(line);
      if (!inSection) {
        html += '<section class="exec-summary-section">';
        inSection = true;
      }
      if (inList) { html += '</ul>'; inList = false; }
      if (projectItem) {
        html += renderProjectItem(projectItem);
        return;
      }
      const leadClass = !portfolioLeadRendered ? ' class="exec-summary-portfolio-lead"' : '';
      html += `<p${leadClass}>${escHtml(line)}</p>`;
      portfolioLeadRendered = true;
    }
  });
  if (inList) html += '</ul>';
  if (inSection) html += '</section>';
  return `<div class="exec-summary-render">${html}</div>`;
}

function getCardMilestones(milestones) {
  const list = milestones || [];
  return { visible: list.slice(0, 2), hiddenCount: Math.max(0, list.length - 2) };
}

function formatExecMilestones(milestones) {
  const list = milestones || [];
  if (list.length === 0) return '<span class="exec-note">No milestones yet.</span>';
  return `<ul class="exec-ms-list">` + list.map(m => `
    <li class="exec-ms-item">
      <div class="exec-ms-body">
        <div class="exec-ms-name">${m.name || '-'}</div>
        <div class="exec-ms-meta">
          <span class="exec-ms-date">${m.date || 'No Date'}</span>
          <span class="exec-ms-badge ${m.status || 'to-do'}">${getStatusLabel(m.status || 'to-do')}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </li>`).join('') + `</ul>`;
}

function chunkTimelineMilestones(list, maxPerRow = 12) {
  if (list.length <= maxPerRow) return [list];
  const rowCount = Math.ceil(list.length / maxPerRow);
  const rowSize = Math.ceil(list.length / rowCount);
  const rows = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < list.length; i += rowSize) rows.push(list.slice(i, i + rowSize));
  return rows;
}

function formatExecProjectMilestones(milestones) {
  const list = milestones || [];
  if (list.length === 0) return '<div class="exec-note">No milestones yet.</div>';
  return `<div class="exec-project-timeline">` + chunkTimelineMilestones(list).map(row => {
    const singleClass = row.length === 1 ? ' single-step' : '';
    return `<div class="exec-project-timeline-track${singleClass}" style="--step-count:${row.length}; grid-template-columns: repeat(${row.length}, minmax(0, 1fr));">` + row.map(m => `
      <div class="exec-project-step ${escHtml(m.status || 'to-do')}">
        <div class="exec-project-step-label">${escHtml(m.name || '-')}</div>
        <div class="exec-project-step-line"><span class="exec-project-step-dot"></span></div>
        <div class="exec-project-step-date">${escHtml(m.date || '')}</div>
      </div>`).join('') + `</div>`;
  }).join('') + `</div>`;
}

function normalizeMilestonePlan(m, index = 0) {
  const planId = m?.planId || `ms-${index + 1}-${String(m?.name || 'milestone').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/^-|-$/g, '') || 'item'}`;
  const current = {
    name: String(m?.name || ''),
    date: String(m?.date || ''),
    status: String(m?.status || 'to-do')
  };
  return {
    ...current,
    planId,
    baseline: m?.baseline || {...current},
    history: Array.isArray(m?.history) ? m.history : []
  };
}

function milestoneSnapshot(m) {
  return {
    name: String(m?.name || ''),
    date: String(m?.date || ''),
    status: String(m?.status || 'to-do')

function milestoneChanged(a = {}, b = {}) {

function milestoneHistoryHtml(m) {

  return `<div class="milestone-plan-history">

      const from = h.from || {};

function projectByCode(list) {
  return Object.fromEntries((list || []).map(p => [p.code, p]));
}

function diffTextLines(prev, curr) {
  const oldLines = textLines(prev);
  const newLines = textLines(curr);
  const oldSet = new Set(oldLines.map(normText));
  const newSet = new Set(newLines.map(normText));
  return {
    added: newLines.filter(x => !oldSet.has(normText(x))),
    removed: oldLines.filter(x => !newSet.has(normText(x))),
    continued: newLines.filter(x => oldSet.has(normText(x)))
  };
}

function normText(v) {
  return String(v || '').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
}

function milestoneDiff(prev = [], curr = []) {
  const toMap = list => Object.fromEntries((list || []).map(m => [normText(m.name), m]));
  const oldMap = toMap(prev);
  const newMap = toMap(curr);
  return [...new Set([...Object.keys(oldMap), ...Object.keys(newMap)])].map(k => {
    const a = oldMap[k], b = newMap[k];
    if (!a && b) return `Added: ${b.name} (${b.date || '-'}, ${getStatusLabel(b.status || 'planned')})`;
    if (a && !b) return `Removed: ${a.name}`;
    if (a && b && (a.date !== b.date || a.status !== b.status)) return `${b.name}: ${a.date || '-'} / ${getStatusLabel(a.status || 'planned')} -> ${b.date || '-'} / ${getStatusLabel(b.status || 'planned')}`;
    return '';
  }).filter(Boolean);
}

function quarterlyDiff(prev, curr) {
  const asRows = p => getQuarterlyMilestones(p).map(q => ({ name:`${q.quarter || '-'} ${q.goal || '-'}`, date:q.window, status:q.status || 'planned' }));
  return milestoneDiff(asRows(prev || {}), asRows(curr || {}));
}

function projectMovement(prev, curr) {
  const changes = [];
  if (!prev && curr) return [`New project added this week with ${getStatusLabel(curr.status)}, ${curr.progress || 0}% progress.`];
  if (prev && !curr) return ['Project removed from active portfolio.'];
  if (!prev || !curr) return changes;
  if ((prev.progress || 0) !== (curr.progress || 0)) changes.push(`Progress: ${prev.progress || 0}% -> ${curr.progress || 0}%`);
  if (prev.status !== curr.status) changes.push(`Status: ${getStatusLabel(prev.status)} -> ${getStatusLabel(curr.status)}`);
  if (getProjectAttention(prev) !== getProjectAttention(curr)) changes.push(`Attention: ${ATTENTION_MAP[getProjectAttention(prev)]} -> ${ATTENTION_MAP[getProjectAttention(curr)]}`);
  const highlights = diffTextLines(prev.highlight, curr.highlight);
  const risks = diffTextLines(prev.risk, curr.risk);
  const next = diffTextLines(prev.next, curr.next);
  const milestones = milestoneDiff(prev.milestones, curr.milestones);
  const quarterly = quarterlyDiff(prev, curr);
  if (highlights.added.length) changes.push(`New highlights:\n- ${highlights.added.join('\n- ')}`);
  if (risks.added.length) changes.push(`New risks:\n- ${risks.added.join('\n- ')}`);
  if (risks.removed.length) changes.push(`Removed risks:\n- ${risks.removed.join('\n- ')}`);
  if (risks.continued.length) changes.push(`Continued risks:\n- ${risks.continued.join('\n- ')}`);
  if (next.added.length) changes.push(`New next steps:\n- ${next.added.join('\n- ')}`);
  if (milestones.length) changes.push(`Milestone changes:\n- ${milestones.join('\n- ')}`);
  if (quarterly.length) changes.push(`Quarterly milestone changes:\n- ${quarterly.join('\n- ')}`);
  return changes;
}

function addPortfolioSummaryInstruction(prompt) {

Keep it on its own line, without a bullet, before any project updates.\n- The Portfolio Summary must describe overall movement across projects and must not be repeated inside a project bullet.';
  return String(prompt || '')
    .replace(
      '- Return exactly these two section headings, each on its own line: WEEKLY MOVEMENT and MANAGEMENT ASK.',

    )
    .replace(
      '- Never combine multiple projects into one bullet. Use a separate Portfolio: bullet only for a genuinely portfolio-wide point.',
      '- Never combine multiple projects into one bullet. Do not create a Portfolio project bullet because the portfolio-wide point belongs only in Portfolio Summary.'
    );
}

function buildCopilotPrompt() {
  const cur = allWeeks[currentIdx];
  const prev = allWeeks[currentIdx - 1];
  const active = w => (w?.projects || []).filter(p => !p.visibility || p.visibility === 'active');
  const curProjects = active(cur);
  const prevProjects = active(prev);
  const curMap = projectByCode(curProjects);
  const prevMap = projectByCode(prevProjects);
  const codes = [...new Set([...Object.keys(prevMap), ...Object.keys(curMap)])];
  const stat = list => ({
    total:list.length,
    ok:list.filter(p => p.status === 'green').length,
    risk:list.filter(p => p.status === 'yellow').length,
    critical:list.filter(p => p.status === 'red').length,
    action:list.filter(p => getProjectAttention(p) === 'action').length,
    ms:list.reduce((a,p) => a + (p.milestones || []).length, 0)
  });
  const a = stat(prevProjects), b = stat(curProjects);
  const movements = codes.map(code => {
    const oldP = prevMap[code], newP = curMap[code], ref = newP || oldP;
    const changes = projectMovement(oldP, newP);
    return `\n[${ref.name}]\nCode: ${ref.code}\nOwner: ${ref.owner || '-'}\nCurrent status: ${newP ? getStatusLabel(newP.status) : 'Removed'}\nCurrent attention: ${newP ? ATTENTION_MAP[getProjectAttention(newP)] : '-'}\n${changes.length ? changes.join('\n') : 'No meaningful movement detected.'}`;
  }).join('\n');
  return `You are preparing an executive weekly movement summary for LITEON PM Dashboard. The result will be pasted directly into the dashboard and email.\n\nGoal:\nCompare LAST WEEK and THIS WEEK PM inputs. Generate a concise executive summary focused on movement, not static status.\n\nRequired plain-text format:\n- Return plain text only. Do not use Markdown heading symbols, bold text, tables, or code fences.\n- Return exactly these two section headings, each on its own line: WEEKLY MOVEMENT and MANAGEMENT ASK.\n- Under each section, use one bullet per project in this exact pattern: - Exact Project Name: concise update.\n- Use the exact official project name from the supplied data before the colon. Do not add labels such as Delays, Recovery, Escalation, or Kickoff to the project name.\n- Keep every project in a separate bullet and insert one blank line between project bullets so the text remains readable when pasted into email.\n- Each project bullet may contain 1 to 3 concise sentences covering the meaningful movement, business impact, and next step when relevant.\n- Never combine multiple projects into one bullet. Use a separate Portfolio: bullet only for a genuinely portfolio-wide point.\n- WEEKLY MOVEMENT should normally contain 4 to 6 project bullets focused on progress changes, newly completed milestones, delayed milestones, new/continued/resolved risks, and attention changes.\n- MANAGEMENT ASK should contain 2 to 4 project bullets and only decisions, escalations, or unblock actions needed from management.\n- If no management action is needed, write exactly: - No immediate management decision required this week.\n\nContent and tone rules:\n- Do not invent facts. Use only the data below.\n- Do not repeat every project status.\n- Prioritize Executive Action, At Risk, Critical, changed items, and management blockers.\n- The audience includes cross-functional department leaders. Use professional, constructive, and diplomatically neutral language.\n- Avoid blame, implied ownership disputes, or potentially contentious labels such as "scope creep". Describe the observable change, impact, and needed action instead.\n- For internally driven issues, keep the wording positive and neutral, emphasizing alignment, clarification, recovery, or next steps rather than fault.\n- For externally driven issues, preserve the relevant verified facts, source, timing, and impact without speculation or emotional wording.\n- Do not assign responsibility to a person or department unless the supplied data explicitly states it and the attribution is essential to a management decision.\n\nDATA\n\nWEEK COMPARISON\nLast week: ${prev ? `${prev.weekLabel} (${prev.weekDate})` : 'No previous week available'}\nThis week: ${cur.weekLabel} (${cur.weekDate})\n\nPORTFOLIO MOVEMENT\nTotal projects: ${a.total} -> ${b.total}\nOn Track: ${a.ok} -> ${b.ok}\nAt Risk: ${a.risk} -> ${b.risk}\nCritical: ${a.critical} -> ${b.critical}\nExecutive Action: ${a.action} -> ${b.action}\nMilestones: ${a.ms} -> ${b.ms}\n\nPROJECT MOVEMENT DETAILS\n${movements}\n\nCURRENT EXECUTIVE RISK LIST\n${curProjects.filter(shouldIncludeRisk).map(p => `- ${p.name}: ${riskItems(p).join(' | ') || 'No blocker text'}; why escalated: ${riskReasons(p).join(' / ')}; owner: ${p.owner || '-'}; next action: ${textLines(p.next)[0] || '-'}`).join('\n') || '- No current executive risks.'}\n`;
}

    if (isReleased) {
      bannerPills.innerHTML = `
        <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:var(--s2); padding:4px 8px; border-radius:6px; border:1px solid var(--border);">
          <span style="color:var(--green); font-size:12px; font-weight:700; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px;">
            <svg style="width:14px;height:14px" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline></svg>
            Released
          </span>
          <div style="width:1px; height:12px; background:var(--border2);"></div>
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="toggleReleaseWeek()" style="padding:2px 6px; font-size:10px; border:none; background:transparent;" title="Revert to Draft mode">Revert to Draft</button>
        </div>
      `;
    } else {
      bannerPills.innerHTML = `
        <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:#FFF8E1; padding:4px 4px 4px 10px; border-radius:6px; border:1px solid #F3E5AB;">
          <span style="color:#B09854; font-size:12px; font-weight:700;">✎ DRAFT</span>
          <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="toggleReleaseWeek()" style="padding:4px 10px; font-size:11px; background:#D4B86A; border-color:#D4B86A;">🚀 Release to VIP</button>
        </div>
      `;
    }
  }

  let projs = week.projects || [];
  
  const visFilter = document.getElementById('visSelect') ? document.getElementById('visSelect').value : 'active';
  if (isVipPerspective() || currentRole !== 'admin' || visFilter === 'active') {
     projs = projs.filter(p => !p.visibility || p.visibility === 'active');
  }

  if (currentPMFilter !== 'all' && !isOverview) {
    projs = projs.filter(p => p.owner === currentPMFilter);
  }

  const total = projs.length;
  const critical = projs.filter(p => p.status === 'red').length;
  const atRisk = projs.filter(p => p.status === 'yellow').length;
  const onTrack = total - critical - atRisk;

  document.getElementById('m_total').textContent = total;
  document.getElementById('m_critical').textContent = critical;
  document.getElementById('m_atrisk').textContent = atRisk;
  document.getElementById('m_ontrack').textContent = onTrack;
  const showTopMetrics = !(isVipPerspective() || isOverview);
  document.getElementById('topMetricsGrid').style.display = showTopMetrics ? 'grid' : 'none';

  renderNormal(projs);
  renderExec(projs, week.summary);
  
  if (isVipPerspective()) {
    document.getElementById('normalView').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('execView').style.display = 'block';
  } else {
    document.getElementById('normalView').style.display = isOverview ? 'none' : 'block';
    document.getElementById('execView').style.display = isOverview ? 'block' : 'none';
    
    const btnOverview = document.getElementById('btnOverview');
    if (isOverview) {
      btnOverview.classList.add('active');
    } else {
      btnOverview.classList.remove('active');
    }
  }
};

window.addExecutiveTimelineRow = () => {

  row.innerHTML = `<input class="fi etm-row-label" placeholder="Category">

};

function collectExecutiveMilestoneTimeline() {
  const title = document.querySelector('.etm-title')?.value.trim() || 'Selected 2026 DCDC Milestone Timeline';
  const rows = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#execTimelineRows .exec-timeline-row')).map(row => ({
    label: row.querySelector('.etm-row-label')?.value.trim() || '',
    cells: Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('.etm-cell')).map(cell => textLines(cell.value))
  })).filter(row => row.label || row.cells.some(cell => cell.length));
  const phases = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.etm-phase')).map(input => input.value.trim());
  return normalizeExecutiveMilestoneTimeline({
    title,
    quarters: ['Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', 'Q4'],
    rows,
    phases
  });
}

window.openStrategyLayerModal = () => {
  const week = allWeeks[currentIdx];
  if (!week) return;
  const layer = getStrategyLayer(week);
  const projs = (week.projects || []).filter(p => !p.visibility || p.visibility === 'active');
  const quarters = getStrategyYears(projs, layer, { includeNextYear: true }).flatMap(getQuarterLabelsForYear);

  document.getElementById('quarterGoalEditor').innerHTML = renderExecutiveMilestoneEditor(layer.executiveMilestoneTimeline);

  const checkpointOptions = UNIVERSAL_CHECKPOINTS.map(c => `<option value="${escHtml(c)}">${escHtml(c)}</option>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('projectStrategyEditor').innerHTML = projs.map(p => {
    const s = getProjectStrategy(p, layer);
    return `<div class="project-map-row" data-code="${escHtml(p.code)}">
      <input class="fi pm-project" value="${escHtml(p.name)}" readonly style="background:var(--s3); color:var(--muted);">
      <input class="fi pm-objective" value="${escHtml(s.businessObjective || '')}" placeholder="Business objective / customer name">
      <select class="fs pm-checkpoint"><option value="">Checkpoint not set</option>${checkpointOptions}</select>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
  document.querySelectorAll('.project-map-row').forEach(row => {
    const s = getProjectStrategy(projs.find(p => p.code === row.dataset.code), layer);
    row.querySelector('.pm-checkpoint').value = s.checkpoint || '';
  });

  document.getElementById('strategyOverlay').classList.add('open');
};

window.openExecutiveTimelineEditor = () => {

    editor?.scrollIntoView({ block: 'start', behavior: 'smooth' });

window.addQuarterExecutiveGoalRow = (quarter, goal = {}, layer = getStrategyLayer()) => {
  const group = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.quarter-goal-group')).find(el => el.dataset.quarter === quarter);
  if (!group) return;
  const normalized = normalizeQuarterGoalEntry(goal);
  const trackOptions = layer.tracks.map(t => `<option value="${escHtml(t.id)}" ${t.id === normalized.trackId ? 'selected' : ''}>${escHtml(t.label)}</option>`).join('');
  const row = document.createElement('div');
  row.className = 'quarter-goal-row';
  row.innerHTML = `
    <input class="fi qg-summary" value="${escHtml(normalized.summary)}" placeholder="Executive goal / business target">
    <select class="fs qg-track">${trackOptions}</select>
    <select class="fs qg-schedule">${healthSelectOptions(normalized.health.schedule)}</select>
    <select class="fs qg-resource">${healthSelectOptions(normalized.health.resource)}</select>
    <select class="fs qg-risk">${healthSelectOptions(normalized.health.risk)}</select>
    <button class="qg-delete" onclick="this.parentElement.remove();" title="Delete executive goal">🗑️</button>
  `;

window.saveStrategyLayer = async () => {
  const week = allWeeks[currentIdx];
  if (!week || !currentUser) return;
  showLoader("Saving Strategy Layer...");
  try {
    const base = getStrategyLayer(week);
    const executiveMilestoneTimeline = serializeExecutiveMilestoneTimeline(collectExecutiveMilestoneTimeline());
    const projectMap = {};
    document.querySelectorAll('.project-map-row').forEach(row => {
      const code = row.dataset.code || '';
      const businessObjective = row.querySelector('.pm-objective').value.trim();
      const checkpoint = row.querySelector('.pm-checkpoint').value;
      if (code && (businessObjective || checkpoint)) {
        projectMap[code] = { businessObjective, checkpoint };
      }
    });
    const strategyLayer = {
      activeTrack: 'all',
      tracks: base.tracks || STRATEGIC_TRACKS,
      quarterGoals: base.quarterGoals || {},
      executiveMilestoneTimeline,
      projectMap
    };
    const savedWeek = await confirmWeekMutation(
      week,
      { strategyLayer, lastModifiedBy: currentUser.email },
      candidate => setDoc(
        doc(db, "weeks", candidate.weekLabel.replace(/\s+/g, '-')),
        candidate
      )
    );
    allWeeks[currentIdx] = savedWeek;
    closeModal('strategyOverlay');
    render();
    showSaveToast("Strategy layer saved");
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Strategy layer save failed", err);
    showSaveToast(getWriteErrorMessage(err));
  } finally {
    hideLoader();
  }
};

function findCurrentProject(code) {
  const week = allWeeks[currentIdx];
  return week?.projects?.find(p => p.code === code);
}

function bindDecisionControls(editable) {
  if (!editable) return;
  document.querySelectorAll('.attention-select').forEach(sel => {
    sel.onchange = async () => {
      const p = findCurrentProject(sel.dataset.code);
      if (!p) return;
      p.attention = sel.value;
      p.attentionManual = true;
      await saveCurrentWeekQuietly();
      showSaveToast("Attention updated");
    };
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('.risk-toggle').forEach(chk => {
    chk.onchange = async () => {
      const p = findCurrentProject(chk.dataset.code);
      if (!p) return;
      p.riskList = chk.checked;
      p.riskManual = true;
      await saveCurrentWeekQuietly();
      render();
      showSaveToast("Risk list updated");
    };
  });
  document.querySelectorAll(".attention-item[draggable='true']").forEach(item => {
    item.addEventListener('dragstart', e => {
      e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', item.dataset.code);
      item.classList.add('dragging');
    });
    item.addEventListener('dragend', () => item.classList.remove('dragging'));
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('.attention-quad[data-attention]').forEach(quad => {
    quad.addEventListener('dragover', e => {
      e.preventDefault();
      quad.classList.add('drag-over');
    });
    quad.addEventListener('dragleave', () => quad.classList.remove('drag-over'));
    quad.addEventListener('drop', async e => {
      e.preventDefault();
      quad.classList.remove('drag-over');
      const p = findCurrentProject(e.dataTransfer.getData('text/plain'));
      if (!p) return;
      p.attention = quad.dataset.attention;
      p.attentionManual = true;
      await saveCurrentWeekQuietly();
      render();
      showSaveToast("Attention updated");
    });
  });
}

function ensurePrimaryRiskActionPair() {
  const rows = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.risk-pair-row'));
  if (!rows.length) return;
  const hasPrimary = rows.some(row => row.querySelector('.rap-primary')?.checked);
  if (!hasPrimary) rows[0].querySelector('.rap-primary').checked = true;
}

function collectRiskActionPairs() {
  const rows = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.risk-pair-row'));
  const pairs = rows.map(row => ({
    primary: row.querySelector('.rap-primary')?.checked === true,
    risk: row.querySelector('.rap-risk')?.value.trim() || '',
    action: row.querySelector('.rap-action')?.value.trim() || ''
  })).filter(item => item.risk || item.action);
  if (pairs.length && !pairs.some(item => item.primary)) pairs[0].primary = true;
  return pairs.sort((a, b) => Number(b.primary) - Number(a.primary));
}

function collectMilestonesWithHistory(previousProject) {
  const previous = (previousProject?.milestones || []).map((m, index) => normalizeMilestonePlan(m, index));
  const previousById = new Map(previous.map(m => [m.planId, m]));
  return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.ms-row')).map((div, index) => {
    const planId = div.dataset.planId || `ms-new-${Date.now()}-${index}`;
    const current = {
      planId,
      name: div.querySelector('.ms-name').value,
      date: div.querySelector('.ms-date').value,
      status: div.querySelector('.ms-status').value
    };
    const prev = previousById.get(planId) || previous[index];
    const normalizedPrev = prev ? normalizeMilestonePlan(prev, index) : null;
    const baseline = normalizedPrev?.baseline || milestoneSnapshot(current);
    const history = normalizedPrev?.history ? [...normalizedPrev.history] : [];
    if (normalizedPrev && milestoneChanged(milestoneSnapshot(normalizedPrev), current)) {
      history.push({
        changedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        weekLabel: allWeeks[currentIdx]?.weekLabel || '',
        changedBy: currentUser?.email || '',
        from: milestoneSnapshot(normalizedPrev),
        to: milestoneSnapshot(current)
      });
    }
    return {...current, baseline, history};
  });
}

window.ensurePrimaryRiskActionPair = ensurePrimaryRiskActionPair;

window.addRiskActionPairRow = (risk = '', action = '', primary = false) => {

    <textarea class="ft rap-risk" rows="2" placeholder="Risk / Blocker shown in Overview">${escHtml(risk)}</textarea>
    <textarea class="ft rap-action" rows="2" placeholder="Required Action shown in Overview">${escHtml(action)}</textarea>
    <button class="risk-pair-delete" onclick="this.parentElement.remove(); ensurePrimaryRiskActionPair();" title="Delete risk/action pair">🗑️</button>
  `;
  container.appendChild(row);
  row.querySelector('.rap-primary').addEventListener('change', ensurePrimaryRiskActionPair);
  ensurePrimaryRiskActionPair();
};

window.openProjEdit = (code, isNew = false) => {
  isCreatingNew = isNew;
  editingProjCode = code;
  const week = allWeeks[currentIdx];
  let p = isNew ? {name:'', code:'', owner:'', deputy:'', customer:'', location:'', visibility:'active', milestones:[], quarterlyMilestones:[], status:'green', progress:0, attention:'watch', highlight:'', weeklyActions:'', risk:'', next:'', riskActions:[]} : week.projects.find(x => x.code === code);
  
  document.getElementById('peTitle').textContent = isNew ? "New Project" : "Edit Project";
  
  document.getElementById('pe_status').value = p.status || 'green';
  document.getElementById('pe_progress').value = p.progress || 0;
  document.getElementById('pe_attention').innerHTML = Object.entries(ATTENTION_MAP).map(([v,l]) => `<option value="${v}" ${getProjectAttention(p)===v?'selected':''}>${l}</option>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('pe_highlight').value = p.highlight || '';
  document.getElementById('pe_weekly_actions').value = p.weeklyActions || p.weeklyAction || '';
  document.getElementById('pe_risk').value = p.risk || '';
  document.getElementById('pe_next').value = p.next || '';
  const riskPairCont = document.getElementById('riskActionPairContainer');
  riskPairCont.innerHTML = '';
  const pairs = getRiskActionPairs(p);
  (pairs.length ? pairs : [{ risk:'', action:'', primary:true }]).forEach(item => addRiskActionPairRow(item.risk, item.action, item.primary));
  
  document.getElementById('pe_name').value = p.name || '';
  document.getElementById('pe_code').value = p.code || '';
  
  const safeOwners = [...new Set([PROJECT_MEMBER_TBD, ...PM_LIST, p.owner])].filter(Boolean);
  const safeDeputys = [...new Set([PROJECT_MEMBER_TBD, ...PM_LIST, p.deputy])].filter(Boolean);
  
  document.getElementById('pe_owner').innerHTML = safeOwners.map(m => `<option ${p.owner===m?'selected':''}>${m}</option>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('pe_deputy').innerHTML = safeDeputys.map(m => `<option ${p.deputy===m?'selected':''}>${m}</option>`).join('');
  
  document.getElementById('pe_customer').value = p.customer || '';
  document.getElementById('pe_location').value = p.location || '';
  document.getElementById('pe_visibility').value = p.visibility || 'active';
  
  const msCont = document.getElementById('msListContainer');
  msCont.innerHTML = '';
  (p.milestones || []).forEach((m, index) => addMilestoneRow(m.name, m.status, m.date, normalizeMilestonePlan(m, index)));
  const qmsCont = document.getElementById('qmsListContainer');
  qmsCont.innerHTML = '';
  getQuarterlyMilestones(p).forEach(m => addQuarterlyMilestoneRow(m.quarter, m.goal, m.window, m.status));
  
  const actionDiv = document.getElementById('adminProjActions');
  if (currentRole === 'admin') {
    actionDiv.style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('pe_btn_delete').style.display = isNew ? 'none' : 'inline-block';
  } else {
    actionDiv.style.display = 'none';
  }

  document.getElementById('pe_details').open = isNew;
  document.getElementById('projEditOverlay').classList.add('open');
};

window.saveProjEdit = async () => {
  closeModal('projEditOverlay');
  showLoader("Saving Project...");
  
  const week = allWeeks[currentIdx];
  const previousProject = isCreatingNew ? null : week.projects.find(x => x.code === editingProjCode);
  const milestones = collectMilestonesWithHistory(previousProject);
  const quarterlyMilestones = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.qms-row')).map(div => ({
    quarter: div.querySelector('.qms-quarter').value,
    goal: div.querySelector('.qms-goal').value,
    window: div.querySelector('.qms-window').value,
    status: div.querySelector('.qms-status').value
  })).filter(m => m.quarter || m.goal || m.window);
  const riskActions = collectRiskActionPairs();
  const riskText = riskActions.map(item => item.risk).filter(Boolean).join('\n');
  const nextText = riskActions.map(item => item.action).filter(Boolean).join('\n');
  
  const pData = {
    name: document.getElementById('pe_name').value,
    code: document.getElementById('pe_code').value,
    owner: document.getElementById('pe_owner').value,
    deputy: document.getElementById('pe_deputy').value,
    customer: document.getElementById('pe_customer').value,
    location: document.getElementById('pe_location').value,
    visibility: document.getElementById('pe_visibility').value || 'active',
    milestones: milestones,
    quarterlyMilestones: quarterlyMilestones,
    status: document.getElementById('pe_status').value,
    progress: parseInt(document.getElementById('pe_progress').value) || 0,
    attention: document.getElementById('pe_attention').value,
    attentionManual: true,
    highlight: document.getElementById('pe_highlight').value.trim(),
    weeklyActions: document.getElementById('pe_weekly_actions').value.trim(),
    riskActions: riskActions,
    risk: riskText,
    next: nextText
  };

  if(isCreatingNew) {
    week.projects.push(pData);
  } else {
    const idx = week.projects.findIndex(x => x.code === editingProjCode);
    week.projects[idx] = {...week.projects[idx], ...pData};
  }
  
  week.lastModifiedBy = currentUser.email;
  await setDoc(doc(db, "weeks", week.weekLabel.replace(/\s+/g, '-')), week);
  
  await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 600)); 
  hideLoader();
  showSaveToast("Project saved successfully");
};

window.addMilestoneRow = (name='', status='to-do', dateStr='', planData = null) => {
  const normalized = planData ? normalizeMilestonePlan(planData) : normalizeMilestonePlan({ name, status, date: dateStr, history: [] });
  if (!planData) normalized.planId = `ms-new-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7)}`;
  const div = document.createElement('div');
  div.className = "ms-row";
  div.dataset.planId = normalized.planId;
  div.draggable = true;

  div.ondragstart = (e) => { e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', ''); e.target.classList.add('dragging'); };
  div.ondragend = (e) => { e.target.classList.remove('dragging'); checkMsDates(); };
  
  div.innerHTML = `
    <span style="cursor:grab; color:var(--muted)">☰</span>
    <input class="fi ms-name" style="flex:2" value="${escHtml(name)}" placeholder="Milestone Name">

    <select class="fs ms-status">
      <option ${status==='to-do'?'selected':''}>to-do</option>
      <option ${status==='in-progress'?'selected':''}>in-progress</option>

      <option ${status==='done'?'selected':''}>done</option>
    </select>
    <button onclick="this.parentElement.remove(); checkMsDates();" style="border:none; background:none; cursor:pointer;">🗑️</button>
  `;

  document.getElementById('msListContainer').appendChild(div);
  checkMsDates();
}

window.addQuarterlyMilestoneRow = (quarter='', goal='', windowText='', status='planned') => {
  const selectedQuarter = quarter || nextQuarterLabelFromRows();
  const selectedMonth = windowText || quarterMonthOptions(selectedQuarter)[0] || '';
  const div = document.createElement('div');
  div.className = "qms-row";
  div.innerHTML = `
    <select class="fs qms-quarter">${quarterSelectOptions(selectedQuarter).map(q => `<option value="${escHtml(q)}" ${q === selectedQuarter ? 'selected' : ''}>${escHtml(q)}</option>`).join('')}</select>
    <input class="fi qms-goal" value="${escHtml(goal || '')}" placeholder="Quarterly target / business objective">
    <select class="fs qms-window">${monthSelectOptions(selectedQuarter, selectedMonth)}</select>
    <select class="fs qms-status">
      <option value="planned" ${status==='planned'||!status?'selected':''}>planned</option>
      <option value="done" ${status==='done'?'selected':''}>done</option>
      <option value="at-risk" ${status==='at-risk'||status==='risk'?'selected':''}>at-risk</option>
    </select>
    <button class="qms-delete" onclick="this.parentElement.remove();" title="Delete quarterly milestone">🗑️</button>
  `;
  const quarterSelect = div.querySelector('.qms-quarter');
  const monthSelect = div.querySelector('.qms-window');
  const deleteButton = div.querySelector('.qms-delete');
  const syncDeleteState = () => {
    const past = isPastQuarter(quarterSelect.value);
    deleteButton.disabled = past;
    deleteButton.title = past ? 'Past quarters cannot be deleted' : 'Delete quarterly milestone';
  };
  quarterSelect.onchange = () => {
    monthSelect.innerHTML = monthSelectOptions(quarterSelect.value, quarterMonthOptions(quarterSelect.value)[0] || '');
    syncDeleteState();
    sortQuarterlyMilestoneRows();
  };
  monthSelect.onchange = sortQuarterlyMilestoneRows;
  syncDeleteState();
  document.getElementById('qmsListContainer').appendChild(div);
  sortQuarterlyMilestoneRows();
}

function sortQuarterlyMilestoneRows() {
  const container = document.getElementById('qmsListContainer');
  if (!container) return;
  const rows = Array.from(container.querySelectorAll('.qms-row'));
  rows
    .map((row, order) => ({
      row,
      order,
      qIndex: parseQuarterLabel(row.querySelector('.qms-quarter')?.value)?.index ?? Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER,
      monthIndex: quarterMonthOptions(row.querySelector('.qms-quarter')?.value).indexOf(row.querySelector('.qms-window')?.value)
    }))
    .sort((a, b) => a.qIndex - b.qIndex || (a.monthIndex < 0 ? 99 : a.monthIndex) - (b.monthIndex < 0 ? 99 : b.monthIndex) || a.order - b.order)
    .forEach(item => container.appendChild(item.row));
}

const msCont = document.getElementById('msListContainer');
msCont.addEventListener('dragover', e => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const draggable = document.querySelector('.dragging');
  if(!draggable) return;
  const afterElement = getDragAfterElement(msCont, e.clientY);
  if (afterElement == null) {
    msCont.appendChild(draggable);
  } else {
    msCont.insertBefore(draggable, afterElement);
  }
});

function getDragAfterElement(container, y) {
  const draggableElements = [...container.querySelectorAll('.ms-row:not(.dragging)')];
  return draggableElements.reduce((closest, child) => {
    const box = child.getBoundingClientRect();
    const offset = y - box.top - box.height / 2;
    if (offset < 0 && offset > closest.offset) return { offset: offset, element: child };
    else return closest;
  }, { offset: Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY }).element;
}

window.checkMsDates = () => {
  const rows = document.querySelectorAll('.ms-row');
  let prevDate = null;
  rows.forEach(row => {
    const dateInput = row.querySelector('.ms-date');
    dateInput.style.color = 'inherit';
    dateInput.style.borderColor = 'var(--border2)';
    
    if(dateInput.value) {
      const currDate = new Date(dateInput.value);
      if (prevDate && currDate < prevDate) {
         dateInput.style.color = 'var(--red)';
         dateInput.style.borderColor = 'var(--red)';
         dateInput.title = "Date conflicts with previous milestone";
      }
      prevDate = currDate;
    }
  });
};

// ── WEEK MANAGEMENT COMBINED LOGIC ──
window.openWeekManagement = () => {
  const week = allWeeks[currentIdx];

  document.getElementById('wm_current_title').textContent = `Editing: ${week.weekLabel}`;
  document.getElementById('wm_summary').value = week.summary || '';
  bindWeeklySummaryCleaner();
  
  const sel = document.getElementById('wm_nw_label');
  sel.innerHTML = '';
  
  let baseDate = new Date();
  if (allWeeks.length > 0) {
    const lastWk = allWeeks[allWeeks.length - 1];
    const yearMatch = lastWk.weekLabel.match(/\d{4}/);
    const year = yearMatch ? yearMatch[0] : new Date().getFullYear();
    const monthDay = lastWk.weekDate.split('-')[0].trim();
    const parsedDate = new Date(`${monthDay}, ${year}`);
    if (!isNaN(parsedDate)) {
       baseDate = parsedDate;
    }
  }
  
  const wkData = getIsoWeekData(baseDate, 1);
  const opt = document.createElement('option');
  opt.value = wkData.label;
  opt.dataset.date = wkData.dateStr;
  opt.textContent = wkData.label;
  sel.appendChild(opt);
  
  window.updateWmDate();
  updateCopilotPrompt();

};

window.updateCopilotPrompt = () => {

  const currentWeek = allWeeks[currentIdx];

    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(prompt.value);

function cleanWeeklySummaryTextarea() {
  const field = document.getElementById('wm_summary');
  if (!field) return;
  const cleaned = sanitizeSummaryInput(field.value);
  if (cleaned && cleaned !== field.value) field.value = cleaned;
}

function bindWeeklySummaryCleaner() {
  const field = document.getElementById('wm_summary');
  if (!field || field.dataset.cleanerBound === 'true') return;
  field.dataset.cleanerBound = 'true';
  field.addEventListener('paste', () => setTimeout(cleanWeeklySummaryTextarea, 0));
  field.addEventListener('blur', cleanWeeklySummaryTextarea);
}

window.createNewWeekFromManage = async () => {
  const sel = document.getElementById('wm_nw_label');
  const label = sel.value;
  const date = document.getElementById('wm_nw_date').value;
  if (!label) return;
  
  closeModal('weekManageOverlay');
  showLoader("Creating New Week...");
  
  let projects = [];
  if (allWeeks.length > 0) {
    projects = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(allWeeks[allWeeks.length - 1].projects || []));
    projects = projects.filter(p => !p.visibility || p.visibility === 'active');
  }
  
  const newWeek = {
    weekLabel: label,
    weekDate: date,
    summary: '', 
    lastModifiedBy: currentUser.email,
    projects: projects,
    isReleased: false 
  };
  
  jumpToLatestOnNextRender = true;
  await setDoc(doc(db, "weeks", label.replace(/\s+/g, '-')), newWeek);
  
  await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 600));
  hideLoader();
  showSaveToast("New week created");
};

function getIsoWeekData(baseDate, offsetWeeks) {
  let d = new Date(baseDate);
  d.setDate(d.getDate() + (offsetWeeks * 7));
  
  let day = d.getDay() || 7;
  d.setDate(d.getDate() - day + 1); 
  let mon = new Date(d);
  
  let fri = new Date(d);
  fri.setDate(fri.getDate() + 4); 
  
  let target = new Date(mon.valueOf());
  let dayNr = (mon.getDay() + 6) % 7;
  target.setDate(target.getDate() - dayNr + 3);
  let firstThursday = target.valueOf();
  target.setMonth(0, 1);
  if (target.getDay() !== 4) target.setMonth(0, 1 + ((4 - target.getDay()) + 7) % 7);
  let weekNum = 1 + Math.ceil((firstThursday - target) / 604800000);
  let year = target.getFullYear(); 
  
  let format = dt => dt.toLocaleString('en-US', {month: 'short', day: 'numeric'});
  return {
    label: `W${weekNum} ${year}`,
    dateStr: `${format(mon)} - ${format(fri)}`
  };
}
